member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter
member.summary: Represent BolapanControls.PropertyFilter.ColumnFilter control, which show filter View for associated Model. If defined as part of System.Windows.Controls.Primitives.DataGridColumnHeader template, represent filter View for current column.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.OnApplyTemplate
member.summary: When overridden in a derived class, is invoked whenever application code or internal processes (such as a rebuilding layout pass) call .

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.CreateModel
member.summary: Initializes the filter view model.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.BindingPathProperty
member.summary: BindingPath Attached Dependency Property

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.GetBindingPath(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: Gets the BindingPath property. This dependency property indicates path to the property in ParentCollection.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.SetBindingPath(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.String)
member.summary: Sets the BindingPath property. This dependency property indicates path to the property in ParentCollection.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.InitializersProperty
member.summary: Initializers Attached Dependency Property

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.GetInitializers(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: Gets the FilterInitializersManager that used for generate ColumnFilter.Model.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ColumnFilter.SetInitializers(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets the FilterInitializersManager that used for generate ColumnFilter.Model.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterCommand
member.summary: Define Filter commands.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterCommand.Show
member.summary: Gets the value that represents the Show filter routed command. The Items.Show default gesture KeyGesture(Key.F, ModifierKeys.Control | ModifierKeys.Alt).

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterCommand.Clear
member.summary: Gets the value that represents the Clear filter routed command.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterCommand.GetParent``1(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: Seek first parent of type T in visual tree.
member.returns: First parent of type T in visual tree or null, if not exist.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl
member.summary: Common Filter control that represent collection of Filters in UI.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.State
member.summary: Visual states of FilterControl.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.State.Disable
member.summary: FilterControl is disable.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.State.Enable
member.summary: FilterControl is enable.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.State.Open
member.summary: DropDown part is show.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.State.Active
member.summary: Filter is active.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.filterPresenter
member.summary: Instance of FilterPresenter that attached to FilterControl.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.#ctor
member.summary: Create new instance of FilterControl.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.CreateModel
member.summary: Create model for FilterControl, if it is possible in current state.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.ParentCollectionProperty
member.summary: Parent Dependency Property

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.ParentCollection
member.summary: Gets or sets the source collection for filtering. May be ICollectionView or any IEnumerable. If Parent is ICollectionView, FilterControl bind to Parent itself; otherwise, FilterControl bind to default collection view for the given source collection.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnParentCollectionChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles changes to the Parent property.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnParentCollectionChanged(System.Collections.IEnumerable,System.Collections.IEnumerable)
member.summary: Trying to load a model and provides derived classes an opportunity to handle changes to the Parent property.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.KeyProperty
member.summary: Key Dependency Property

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the key for the identification filter (the filter set) in the parent collection view filters. The key and initializers from FilterInitializersManager define a set of filters that ItemsPresenter provides into a view model for the FilterControl. If multiple instances of the Filter Control have the same key and FilterInitializer in FilterInitializersManager, then these instances will display the same filter in the view model. Derived classes can give an additional meaning to the value of the properties Key. For example, the class ColumnFilter uses key value as name of the item property.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnKeyChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles changes to the Key property.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnKeyChanged(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Provides derived classes an opportunity to handle changes to the Key property.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.FilterInitializersManagerProperty
member.summary: FilterInitializersManager Dependency Property

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.FilterInitializersManager
member.summary: Gets or sets the FilterInitializersManager. FilterInitializersManager contains a set of initializers determines the composition of the filters in the view model. If FIlterInitializersManager is null, it used default FilterInitialisersManager that provided by FilterInitializersManager.Default static property. FilterInitializersManager.Default included EqualFilterInitializer, LessOrEqualFilterInitializer, GreaterOrEqualFilterInitializer, RangeFilterInitializer(), StringFilterInitializer(), EnumFilterInitializer().

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnFilterInitializersManagerChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles changes to the FilterInitializersManager property.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnFilterInitializersManagerChanged(ITCC.ItemsFilter.Initializer.FilterInitializersManager,ITCC.ItemsFilter.Initializer.FilterInitializersManager)
member.summary: Provides derived classes an opportunity to handle changes to the FilterInitializersManager property.

member.name: F:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.ModelPropertyKey
member.summary: Model Read-Only Dependency Property

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.Model
member.summary: Gets the FilterControlVm.
member.return: Instance of FilterControlVm if FilterControl was successfully attached to ParentCollection, otherwise null.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnModelChanged(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Windows.DependencyPropertyChangedEventArgs)
member.summary: Handles changes to the Model property.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterControl.OnModelChanged(ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm)
member.summary: Provides derived classes an opportunity to handle changes to the Model property.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterDataGrid
member.summary: Define a standard DataGrid with the included ColumnFilter in the column header template.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilteredEventArgs
member.summary: Provides data for the event

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilteredEventArgs.CollectionView
member.summary: Filtered CollectionView.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterEventArgs
member.summary: Provides information and event data that is associated with the BolapanControl.ItemsFilter.FilterPresenter.Filter event.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterEventArgs.Accepted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the item passes the filter. Returns: true if the item passes the filter; otherwise, false. The default is true.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterEventArgs.Item
member.summary: Gets the object that the filter should test. Returns: The object that the filter should test. The default is null.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.Initializer.EnumFilterInitializer
member.summary: Filter initializer for EnumFilter.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.Initializer.EnumFilterInitializer.NewFilter(ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterPresenter,System.ComponentModel.ItemPropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generate new instance of EnumFilter class, if it is possible for a pair of filterPresenter and propertyInfo.
member.param: FilterPresenter, which can be attached Filter
Key, used as the name for binding property in filterPresenter.Parent collection.
member.returns: Instance of EnumFilter class or null.

member.summary: Base class for PropertyFilter initialiser.

Key for generated Filter. For PropertyFilter, key used as the name for binding property in filterPresenter.Parent collection.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterPresenter.TryGetFilter(System.String,ITCC.ItemsFilter.Initializer.FilterInitializer)
member.summary: Retrieves or tries to create the filter model, using as a key pair {viewKey, initializer}.
member.param: A string representing a key of the set of filters.
Initialiser filter that defines filter in the collection of filters.
member.returns: FilterPresenter instance, if it is possible provide for couples viewKey and initializer. Otherwise, null.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterPresenter.DeferRefresh
member.summary: Enters a defer cycle that you can use to change filter of the view and delay automatic refresh.
member.returns: An System.IDisposable object that you can use to dispose of the calling object.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.FilterPresenter.ReceiveFilterChanged(ITCC.ItemsFilter.Model.IFilter)
member.summary: Receives notice of the change filter conditions and IsActive property.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm
member.summary: View model for FilterControl. FilterControlVm is IEnumerable<Filter>. An instance of FilterControlVm not created directly. Instead, the procedure FilterPresenter.TryGetFilterControlVm(string viewKey, IEnumerable<FilterInitializer> filterInitializers) prepares a model for FilterControl, as IEnumerable<Filter>, where each Filter instance bound to FilterControlVm for the transmission of changes. Usually, instance of FilterControlVm created by FilterControl when it need this and disposed on raise Unload event.

member.name: M:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.Dispose
member.summary: Detach FilterControlVm from all filters and remove all filters from collection.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.State
member.summary: Get FilterControl state.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.IsEnable
member.summary: Get or set FilterControl.IsEnabled.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the popup is currently displaying on the screen.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.IsActive
member.summary: Get or set whether filter is active.

member.name: P:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.IsDisposed
member.summary: Gets whether Dispose has been called.

member.name: E:ITCC.ItemsFilter.ViewModel.FilterControlVm.StateChanged
member.summary: Provede FilterControlStateChanged event.

member.summary: Provide INotifyPropertyChanged implementation for derived class.
